title: Floral Flaky Croatian Mars Bar Dessert Bars
description: Delicate, flaky pastry crust wrapped around a sweet and salty Mars Bar filling, perfect for a Whole30-friendly dessert option. This Croatian-inspired dessert is sure to impress your solo dinner guests.
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together the almond flour, coconut oil, and Himalayan salt until well combined.
Press the mixture into the bottom of a 9x9-inch baking dish.
Bake for 20 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
Melt the Mars Bar in a double boiler or in the microwave in 10-second increments, stirring between each interval until smooth.
Remove the baking dish from the oven and let it cool slightly.
Pour the melted Mars Bar over the top of the pastry crust.
Sprinkle the dried rose petals and unsalted almonds over the top of the Mars Bar layer.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the coconut cream, granulated sugar, lemon juice, and xanthan gum until well combined.
Pour the coconut cream mixture over the top of the Mars Bar layer.
Return the baking dish to the oven and bake for an additional 15-20 minutes, or until the filling is set and the top is lightly golden brown.
Remove the baking dish from the oven and let it cool completely on a wire rack.
Once the dessert has cooled, refrigerate it for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Cut into squares and serve chilled.
Garnish with additional dried rose petals and unsalted almonds, if desired.
